summary: 0.6.46 corrects demo3 toggle-state handling to use the official bool-backed UIToggle value seam and restores side control placement back to the working screen-delta transform path.
operatorSignals: Desktop test showed both shuffle and A-B loop appearing checked even when inactive.
Desktop test also showed the left and right control stacks piled back into the middle again.
actionsTaken: Verified from official VaM code that UIToggleTrigger uses a JSONStorableBool named `value`.
Updated the builder to emit bool-style toggle defaults and the runtime to read/write toggle state through JSONStorableBool.
Reverted side control placement back to the working screen-delta transform path instead of the local-copy experiment.
nonGoals: No interactive A-B checkbox behavior yet.
No slideshow, image-slider transport, or right-stick volume changes in this slice.
